LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF QING LI'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. BASED ON THE COURT'S UNDERSTANDING OF THE DISPUTES, THE AMENDMENT SIMPLY SUPPLEMENTS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THERE WOULD NOT APPEAR TO BE A BASIS TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL MERELY BECAUSE OF THIS AMENDMENT. THERE IS A STRONG PUBLIC POLICY IN FAVOR OF AMENDMENTS WHICH OVERCOMES THE PROBLEMS ARTICULATED BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
